sn38.9:1.1: "Friend Sāriputta, it is said, ‘ignorance, ignorance.’ What now is ignorance?"
sn38.9:1.2: "Not knowing suffering, not knowing the origin of suffering, not knowing the cessation of suffering, not knowing the way leading to the cessation of suffering. This is called ignorance."
sn38.9:1.3: "But, friend, is there a path, is there a way for the abandonment of this ignorance?"
sn38.9:2.2: "There is a path, friend, there is a way … this Noble Eightfold Path … ."
